posts.author: MacGriff (Frank Griffin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to update a Time Zone field based on the Country, City, State, Postal Code fields. How would I do this? Would this need to be some kind of DaaS or Webservice integration or can Monday handle this need natively?

New leads are assigned to “leaders” (sales people) by Time Zone.

If anyone has experience with this type of automation, I would much appreciate your comments and advice.

Thanks!
